news.headline: CFTC sues Kentucky over actions against prediction markets, making it first red state to face federal scrutiny
news.summary: The commission has now sued nine states in total in its battle to defend what it sees as its exclusive right to regulate event contracts.

news.headline: Why Seagate (STX) Stock Is Falling Today
news.summary: Shares of data storage manufacturer Seagate (NASDAQ:STX) fell 6% in the afternoon session after a report that South Korea's SK Hynix is slowing its high-bandwidth memory (HBM) expansion rattled the AI-chip complex.

news.headline: Tesla Quietly Files Megapod Trademark — An AI Data Center Play That Could See Elon Musk Challenging Nvidia's Dominance
news.summary: Tesla Inc. wants to sell modular artificial intelligence data center hardware, according to a new trademark application for a product called "Megapod," which points to the automaker’s next possible AI infrastructure push

news.headline: The Real Engine Behind Apple Stock's Next Potential Climb
news.summary: The company just posted a record-breaking quarter, but the most compelling part of its story might be the sales it couldn't even make.

gamePlan: Bias into tomorrow: Strong Bearish — favor puts / short delta.
Use QQQ $713.65 as the risk-on/off line; trade with it, not against it.
Primary idea: NVDA PUT — enter $9.21–$10.17, target $14.54+, stop $5.81.
Keep total options exposure modest; one A+ setup beats five marginal ones.
report.narrative: Stocks closed lower with SPY -1.45% and QQQ -3.29%. Composite sentiment -73 (Strong Bearish). The tape is being driven mainly by spy trend, qqq / mega-cap tech, vix. VIX at 17.59 (+5.17%). Environment read: favor puts / short delta. Leadership came from Energy; Consumer Discretionary lagged. Today's standouts: MSFT +1.80%, XOM +0.91%. Laggards: TSLA -5.79%, AMD -5.76%. Carrying NVDA as the top idea into tomorrow (7.7/10).
report.riskWarning: Options trading is risky and can result in the loss of the entire premium paid. This report provides analysis and educational information only — not financial advice. Size positions small (1–2% of capital per idea), honor stops, and do your own research.
